title: FlashFreeze
description: Preserve unknown blocks, entities and items
body:
# FlashFreeze


FlashFreeze lets you remove and add content-
adding mods without dropping any blocks, entities or items.   
 

You can use it to migrate to a newer version of Minecraft without waiting for That One Last Mod, or turn content mods on and off one by one to nail down that pesky bug.

## Usage

![Two images of the same scene, one taken with Biomes O'Plenty, Affinity and Wilder Wild installed, and the other one without those mods.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/011c3afdb627049de19d8d3b4080420658ac0919.png)

All unknown blocks, items and entities are presented as missing textures or as Source Engine ERROR models

Once you turn the content mods back on, all the FlashFrozen™ content is defrosted 100% fresh!
